focus.title: 今日要览：4 个类目共 20 条更新
focus.body:
【AI 最新信息】SpaceX has an AI device prototype, and it sure sounds phone-ish
【金融新闻】中国“降温神器”缘何走俏欧洲
【中国新闻】法国官方确定2027年总统选举投票日期
【世界新闻】As Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce prepare to tie the knot, we look back at their relationship

items.title: SpaceX has an AI device prototype, and it sure sounds phone-ish
items.summary: SpaceX reportedly showed investors a "handset-like" AI device before going public. It could be another signal SpaceX wants to expand into wireless.

items.title: Ashton Kutcher leaving Sound Ventures to launch new VC firm with Morgan Beller
items.summary: Sound built its reputation on concentrated, high-conviction bets in category-leading AI labs, while Kutcher's new fund appears to be chasing the layer underneat

items.title: Cloudflare’s new policy pushes AI companies to pay for publishers’ content
items.summary: Cloudflare is giving AI companies until September 15 to separate web crawlers used for search from those used for AI training and agents, or risk being blocked

items.title: Venice AI becomes a unicorn with $65M Series A as its privacy-first AI platform takes off
items.summary: Venice AI is already profitable, with annualized run-rate revenues of over $70 million, CEO Erik Voorhees said.

items.title: Gemini Spark, Google’s agentic assistant, is now available on Mac
items.summary: Google's 24/7 agentic assistant, Gemini Spark, comes to Mac alongside other improvements, like real-time tracking and support for more apps.

items.title: 中国“降温神器”缘何走俏欧洲
items.summary: 6月下旬，欧洲遭遇高温侵袭，多个国家的气温连创历史新高。虽然近日高温有所缓解，但气象预报显示，从7月5日或6日起欧洲或将迎来新一轮热浪。频繁袭来的极端高温，不仅对民众生命健康构成威胁，也对欧洲国家的经济活动造成不容忽视的影响。在这轮创纪录热浪当中，“空调”成为当下欧洲的热门话题，而来自中国的“降温神器”，也成为欧洲民众

items.title: Former retail giant closed over 1,000 locations
items.summary: （该来源未提供摘要，请点击查看原文）

items.title: 上半年深圳海关办理离境退税验核业务量同比增长6.1倍
items.summary: 中新社深圳7月1日电 (记者 索有为)记者1日从深圳海关获悉，今年上半年，深圳海关办理离境退税验核业务7.02万票、验核申请单金额10.1亿元(人民币，下同)，同比分别增长6.1倍、1.2倍。

items.title: 陕西首部民营经济基础性法规落地施行 “靶向”纾困激活市场主体动能
items.summary: 中新网西安7月1日电 (杨英琦)记者1日从陕西省人大常委会新闻发布会获悉，《陕西省实施〈中华人民共和国民营经济促进法〉办法》(以下简称：《实施办法》)自当日起正式施行。作为该省第一部专门关于民营经济发展的基础性法规，标志着陕西民营经济发展步入了法治化轨道。

items.title: 法国官方确定2027年总统选举投票日期
items.summary: 中新社巴黎7月1日电 (记者 李洋)法国官方当地时间1日确定2027年总统选举投票日期，选举首轮投票将于2027年4月18日举行，第二轮投票将于2027年5月2日举行。

items.title: 美贸易代表：美国不续签美墨加协定
items.summary: 中新社华盛顿7月1日电 (记者 沙晗汀)美国贸易代表贾米森·格里尔当地时间7月1日表示，美国决定不续签“美国-墨西哥-加拿大协定”(美墨加协定)，而将继续与墨西哥和加拿大就贸易协定举行会谈。

items.title: 德国就“北溪”天然气管道爆炸事件起诉一名嫌疑人
items.summary: 中新社柏林7月1日电 综合德国媒体1日报道，德国联邦检察院已在汉堡对一名涉嫌策划2022年“北溪”天然气管道爆炸事件的乌克兰籍男子提起公诉。这是德国调查机关就该事件首次正式起诉涉案嫌疑人。

items.title: 上海纽约双城对话共探合作新机遇
items.summary: 中新社纽约7月1日电 (记者 王帆)当地时间6月30日，“上海-纽约双城对话”系列活动之纽约论坛在美国纽约举行。来自中美两国的嘉宾围绕金融、消费、文化等议题展开交流研讨，共探两地合作新机遇。

items.title: 俄外交部：日本部署美国导弹严重破坏亚太地区稳定与安全
items.summary: 中新网7月2日电 据俄罗斯卫星网报道，俄罗斯外交部发言人扎哈罗娃1日表示，俄罗斯认为日本允许在境内部署美国导弹系统是威胁俄罗斯边境之举，严重损害亚太地区的稳定与安全。

items.title: As Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce prepare to tie the knot, we look back at their relationship
items.summary: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are expected to celebrate their wedding with a party at New York's Madison Square Garden this weekend.

items.title: From Truman's pension to Trump's billions - a White House windfall unmatched by any president
items.summary: Historians say Trump's $2.2bn income last year is unprecedented and blurs the line on conflicts of interest.

items.title: Turkish police beat us with iron rods before we lost limbs to frostbite, Afghans say
items.summary: The young migrants heading to Europe say they were stripped and had their hands tied in freezing temperatures.

items.title: Banned by Beijing, this comedian is taking his act to Chinese speakers abroad
items.summary: Chizi, one of China’s biggest stand-up comedians, has found a new stage after falling afoul of China's censors.

items.title: Aunt of Venezuelan boy pulled from rubble tells BBC she will give him 'mother's warmth'
items.summary: Kleiber Moran, 2, was rescued on Wednesday, six days after last week's deadly earthquakes.
